spec_match.rationale: The page consistently describes the payment path changing from SecurityError to NotAllowedError.

interactive.rationale: The delayed and fresh-click probes both run navigator.credentials.create and show the actual error name.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index blurb was corrected to match the page's NotAllowedError framing.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now links to the dedicated iframe envelope, calls out SPC catch-block impact, and notes the virtual-authenticator success path.

references.rationale: The page includes ChromeStatus, SPC spec, and SPC PR references.

design_system.rationale: The demo uses the shared design variables and retains accessible contrast.

summary: The base rename demo, feature blurb, and migration notes now align around SecurityError to NotAllowedError, with the cross-origin iframe case split into its own concept.
